tagline: Where our vet tech expertise sets us apart
description: With a licensed veterinary technician on our team, we provide services that go far beyond what a typical pet sitter can offer. Your pet is in highly trained hands.

services.name: SubQ Fluids & Injection Administration
services.description: Skilled subcutaneous fluid therapy or injection administration for pets requiring ongoing at-home treatment.

services.name: Educational Visits
services.description: Personalized guidance sessions covering puppy training support, anxious pet management, senior care, rabbit behavior, restraint techniques, and more.

services.name: Vet Visit Liaison
services.description: We attend veterinary appointments on your behalf, advocate for your pet, take detailed notes, and relay everything clearly back to you.

services.name: Quality of Life Support Visit
services.description: A compassionate visit focused on your pet's daily comfort, mobility, and routines. We'll help you identify changes to monitor, improve at-home care, and prepare thoughtful questions for your veterinarian.

services.name: Oral Medication Administration
services.description: Reliable, low-stress administration of pills, liquids, or capsules on your veterinarian's prescribed schedule.

services.name: Nail Trim & Ear Cleaning
services.description: Safe, stress-minimized nail trims and gentle external ear canal cleaning using proper veterinary techniques and solutions. Difficult pets accommodated.

description: Ideal for pet owners who want the very best experience for their animals. These services require more time, specialized skill, or hands-on effort.

services.name: Dog Walking (15 min)
services.description: A brisk, focused walk for exercise and a bathroom break. GPS tracked with a post-visit report sent to your phone.

services.name: Dog Field Trips
services.description: Supervised outings to parks, trails, or pet-friendly destinations for enrichment, socialization, and adventure beyond the backyard.

services.name: Extra Playtime & Enrichment
services.description: Dedicated play, mental stimulation, and engagement — puzzle toys, fetch, cuddle time, whatever your pet loves most.

services.name: Rabbit/Exotics Visit
services.description: Hay refresh, food and water top-off, litter cleaning, and gentle handling and enrichment for your small or exotic companion.

services.name: Cage Cleaning
services.description: Thorough cleaning and sanitizing of small animal enclosures, bird cages, and multi-level habitat setups with fresh bedding and supplies.

services.name: Poop Scoop Yard
services.description: Complete yard waste removal — we bag and properly dispose of everything so you come home to a clean, safe outdoor space.

description: Your essential, routine pet care needs — handled with the same professionalism, attention, and love as everything else we do. Consistent, dependable, and always on time.

services.name: Potty Break
services.description: A quick, dedicated visit to let your dog out for a bathroom break — without a full walk. Great for busy weekdays.

services.name: Feed Visit
services.description: We stop by to fill food and water bowls, check on your pet's well-being, and send you a quick update.

services.name: Cat Visit
services.description: Complete feline care — fresh food, clean water, litter box service, and quality social time to keep your cat happy.
